2026-04-13T23:40:16.6646333Z ---
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6646927Z description: |
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6647823Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6687808Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6689419Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6690319Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6690510Z on:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6690906Z   push:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6691354Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6691902Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6692254Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6692463Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6692841Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6693038Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6693686Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6693883Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6694427Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6695142Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6695621Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6696057Z   noop:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6696541Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6697140Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6697585Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6698640Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6699938Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6700579Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6701245Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6702028Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6702535Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6713624Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6715902Z       steps:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6716468Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6717311Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6718049Z           env:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6719043Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6720298Z           with:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6720772Z             script: |
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6721553Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6722648Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6734664Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6735773Z                 return;
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6736305Z               }
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6736609Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6737169Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6738437Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6739403Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6740358Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6741920Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6753932Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6755699Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6756717Z               }
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6757008Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6757684Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6758694Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6759376Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6760206Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6760922Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6761722Z               });
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6762436Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-13T23:40:16.6847342Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6847535Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6847860Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6848052Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6848592Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6849279Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6849764Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6850196Z   noop:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6850676Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6851280Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6851715Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6852732Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6854254Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6854899Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6855567Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6856329Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6856849Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6857397Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6857934Z       steps:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6858452Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6859253Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6859991Z           env:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6860947Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6862182Z           with:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6862664Z             script: |
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6863661Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6864750Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6865896Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6867219Z                 return;
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6867757Z               }
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6868055Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6868395Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6869634Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6870579Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6871390Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6872912Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6874646Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6876407Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6877393Z               }
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6877698Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6878140Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6879125Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6879787Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6880646Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6881351Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6882148Z               });
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6882866Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6883877Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6884052Z tools:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6884486Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6884944Z   github:
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6885408Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6901617Z 
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6901859Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6902839Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6904437Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T23:40:16.6927048Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
